person.name: Christian Callendar
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
FROM DRUMRY HISTORY WEBSITE: The next laird, their son William, was to marry Christian of Callander and inherited the barony of Callander by his father-in-law's forfeiture in 1345. Given Bruce's victory at Bannockburn in 1314, the Livingston family switched allegiance to Bruce. Indeed, William Livingston, grandson of Andrew who was a supporter of Edward Longshanks, became a comissioner to deal with the ransom of Bruce's son King David II in 1357.

Daughter of Sir Patrick de Callendar and Margaret de la Val Wife of Sir William de Livingston Mother of Sir John de Livingston of Callendar; Robert Livingston, Drumry; Patrick Livingston; William De Livingston, Laird of Callendar, Sir; Walter Livingston; Alexander Livingston and Eupheme De Kirkbride

Patrick de Callendar, of Callendar House Birth: circa 1295 Callendar House, Callendar, Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland Death: 1346. Immediate Family: Son of Alwin de Callendar Husband of Margaret de la Val Father of Christian Livingston

Birth: ABT 1316 in Callendar House, Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Callendar於大約1318年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林時，她的父親Patrick de Callander48歲，母親Margaret de la Val34歲。她於1338年與William Livingston Laird of Drumry在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在蘇格蘭享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Callendar于大约1318年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林时，她的父亲Patrick de Callander48岁，母亲Margaret de la Val34岁。她于1338年与William Livingston Laird of Drumry在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在苏格兰享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Callendar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Callender
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English calendre, c(h)alaundrer, kelendrer (Old French calendrier, calendreur) denoting a person who calenders cloth, that is, someone who passes freshly woven cloth between heavy rollers to compress the weave.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Kolander  .

variants.name: Callander
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Callendar near Falkirk (Stirlingshire) or Callander in Perthshire. The original form and meaning of both placenames is unclear, but it is certain that they were once distinct; later the former name was transferred to Perthshire under the Livingstones, Earls of Linlithgow.
In some instances, probably a variant of English   Callender  .
Swedish: probably a variant of Carlander, an ornamental name from karl ‘man’ + the suffix -ander, derived from Greek anēr (genitive andros) ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Callendar was born about 1318, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Patrick de Callander, was 48 and her mother, Margaret de la Val, was 34. She married William Livingston Laird of Drumry in 1338, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1350, in Scotland, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Callendar est née environ 1318, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Patrick de Callander, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Val, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William Livingston Laird of Drumry en 1338, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Écosse, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Callendar um 1318 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Patrick de Callander 48 und ihre Mutter Margaret de la Val 34. Sie hat 1338 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom William Livingston Laird of Drumry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Callendar è nata il circa 1318 nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, Patrick de Callander, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Margaret de la Val, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato William Livingston Laird of Drumry nel 1338, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1350, nel Scotland, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Callendarが約1318年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで生まれた時，父Patrick de Callanderは48歳，母Margaret de la Valは34歳であった。1338年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングでWilliam Livingston Laird of Drumryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にスコットランドで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Callendar(이)가 대략 1318년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Patrick de Callander(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de la Val(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1338년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 William Livingston Laird of Drumry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 스컷랜드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Callendar nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick de Callander, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Val, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com William Livingston Laird of Drumry em 1338, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Scotland, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Callendar родилась около 1318 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Patrick de Callander было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Val, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Livingston Laird of Drumry в 1338 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Callendar nació aproximadamente 1318, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Patrick de Callander, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Val, tenía 34 años. Se casó con William Livingston Laird of Drumry en 1338, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1350, en Scotland, a la edad de 33 años.
